broadcasts.message: New research mission assigned. Each specialist will cover one language: Python, Go, or Rust. Research strengths, weaknesses, performance, and ideal use cases. Report findings to the hive for synthesis.

TASK: Research and build RevOps skills for geekeriOS. Target path: /Users/erin/Desktop/geekeriOS/.claude/skills/. Skill format: YAML frontmatter (name + description), progressive disclosure 4-level SKILL.md. Skills to create: (1) hubspot-revops - HubSpot CRM RevOps workflows, deal lifecycle, pipeline management; (2) n8n-revops-automation - n8n automation patterns for RevOps, HubSpot webhooks, lead routing; (3) gtm-systems-architecture - GTM systems design, ICP, territory, funnel instrumentation; (4) pipeline-intelligence - pipeline forecasting, deal velocity, coverage ratios, revenue reporting; (5) ai-revops-agents - AI-powered RevOps agents, prompt patterns, Claude/GPT in RevOps workflows. Workers: divide research coverage across these 5 skill domains. Store findings in hive memory namespace: revops-skills. Queen will synthesize and write final files.

🐝 ALL WORKERS — HIGH PRIORITY RESEARCH TASK ASSIGNED (task-1773274157988-afxlca). Scouts: divide and conquer the 6 research domains in parallel — CRM automation, HubSpot API, n8n integration, Claude Code slash commands/prompts, data toolchain, and skills gap analysis. Specialists: synthesize scout outputs into a tiered skills framework (foundational / practitioner / advanced). Report findings back to hive shared memory. GO.
